claimPolicy: A positive solver exit flag is not a physical-root claim. Residual, contact, interface, section, crossing, event-order, energy, and finite-state conditions must all pass.

horizonContinuation.qualification: Case A and Case B did not find a physically valid third-stride apex root. A separate stride-boundary N=5 search tested all four single-control bounded-work families; all four final candidates were physical but exceeded residual tolerance, with best norm 0.3086908931991573 and maximum residual 0.11470808666193932. The strongest validated root remains N=2, and no N=5 simulation or infeasibility claim is published.
